productDisplayName: Asics Men's Gel Cushioning White Navy Shoe
description: CompositionWhite and navy blue running shoes with removable sockliner, leather based upper, rear foot cushion with GEL Cushioning System and heel plugWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlightFittingRegularMade for that comfortable running experience, these lightweight shoes from asics with leather upper has a removable sockliner to accommodate a medical orthotic. The GEL Cushioning system helps reduce impact while running and ensures smooth mid distance transition. Designed specifically on designated widths, the heel plug makes it comfortable and supportive. Perfect for urban living.
